subject: fix(quality): address self-review findings from refactoring branch
body:
Fix uncaught JSON.parse in usePWAInstall trackEvent that would throw
on malformed localStorage data. Use calculateIntervals in detectPattern
instead of duplicated inline loop. Move useInstallReminder ref to
module level for shared state consistency. Remove redundant guard in
projectWeeklyInterval.

Tags: cleanup, pwa, engine, patterns
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch

title: address self-review findings from refactoring branch
